hint: A frontiersman mauled by a bear crawls through a frozen wilderness to avenge his son's murder

name: Wolf of Wall Street
hint: A stockbroker builds a firm on fraud, drugs and excess until the FBI closes in — chest-beating motivational speeches

name: The Departed
hint: A cop infiltrates the mob while a mole inside the police feeds information back — neither knows about the other

name: Shutter Island
hint: A marshal investigates a disappearance from a psychiatric island facility — and slowly questions his own mind

name: Memento
hint: A man with no short-term memory hunts his wife's killer using Polaroid photos and tattoos on his own body

name: The Prestige
hint: Two rival magicians destroy each other's lives over a trick involving a transported man and a terrible secret

name: Tenet
hint: A secret agent learns to move through time in reverse to prevent a future war fought with inverted bullets

name: Uncut Gems
hint: A jeweler with a gambling problem bets an Ethiopian opal on an NBA player's performance to pay off his debts

name: Good Time
hint: A man spends one frantic night in New York trying to bail his brother out of jail after a bank robbery goes wrong

name: Saltburn
hint: A scholarship student is invited to a wealthy classmate's estate for the summer — obsession follows him there

name: The Menu
hint: Guests pay a fortune for an exclusive island restaurant where the chef has prepared a very final tasting menu

name: Glass Onion
hint: A tech billionaire invites friends to his Greek island for a murder mystery game — a real murder complicates things

name: Triangle of Sadness
hint: Models on a luxury yacht for the ultra-rich find the power dynamic inverted after a storm sinks everything

name: Banshees of Inisherin
hint: A man on a remote Irish island is told by his lifelong friend he simply doesn't like him anymore — drastic measures follow

name: Elvis
hint: The King's story told through the eyes of his manipulative manager, Colonel Tom Parker

name: Bohemian Rhapsody
hint: The rise of a legendary rock band and its flamboyant frontman, culminating in a legendary Live Aid performance

name: Rocketman
hint: A fantasy musical biopic follows a piano prodigy from childhood through addiction and international stardom

name: A Star Is Born
hint: A country rock star discovers a talented singer in a drag bar and falls in love as his career fades and hers rises

name: Maestro
hint: A celebrated conductor's lifelong marriage is examined through decades of passion, infidelity and devotion

name: Priscilla
hint: A teenager meets the most famous man in the world at 14 and spends years inside the walls of Graceland

name: Past Lives
hint: Childhood sweethearts in Seoul are separated by emigration and reconnect twice across twenty years

name: Aftersun
hint: A woman revisits old holiday footage to understand something about her father she couldn't see as a child

name: The Fabelmans
hint: A boy discovers his passion for making movies and uncovers a family secret hidden in his own home footage

name: Tár
hint: A world-renowned female conductor's carefully constructed life implodes under accusations of abuse

name: Women Talking
hint: Women in an isolated religious colony debate whether to stay, fight or leave after systematic abuse is uncovered

name: Babylon
hint: The chaotic excess of 1920s Hollywood is seen through three characters as silent film gives way to sound

name: Amsterdam
hint: Three friends stumble into one of the most secret and dangerous conspiracies in American history in the 1930s

name: Nope
hint: Two siblings on a remote horse ranch try to photograph something enormous and hungry circling above the clouds

name: Bodies Bodies Bodies
hint: Gen Z friends play a murder game during a hurricane party — someone starts actually dying

name: Smile
hint: A psychiatrist witnesses a patient's violent death and is then stalked by an entity that wears a grinning face

name: Barbarian
hint: A woman arrives at a rented house to find it double-booked — what's in the basement changes everything

name: X
hint: A film crew making an adult movie on a remote Texas farm awakens something murderous in their elderly hosts

name: Pearl
hint: A farm girl in 1918 dreams of stardom while her husband is at war — desperation curdles into something monstrous

name: Prey
hint: A Comanche warrior in 1719 hunts a creature that has already hunted far deadlier things across the galaxy

name: The Black Phone
hint: A kidnapped boy receives calls on a disconnected phone from the killer's previous victims who want to help him escape

name: Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness
hint: A sorcerer travels through broken realities pursued by a grieving witch who wants a girl's power for herself

name: Thor Love and Thunder
hint: A god-killer wielding a screaming axe hunts the gods themselves while Thor's ex-girlfriend picks up his old hammer

name: Black Panther Wakanda Forever
hint: Wakanda mourns its king while a hidden underwater nation and its vibranium-fueled ruler emerge as a new threat

name: Ant-Man and the Wasp Quantumania
hint: A superhero family is sucked into the quantum realm and faces its conqueror who wants to escape back to the multiverse

name: Guardians of the Galaxy Vol 3
hint: The team goes on a desperate mission to save Rocket by uncovering his tragic past and confronting his creator
